title: coreopsis pinnatisecta
intro: Coreopsis pinnatisecta, also known as the grassleaf tickseed, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis pinnatisecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
